sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ فَاطِمَةُ صَادِقَةً دَائِمًا فِي كَلَامِهَا.
sentences.translation: Fatima je uvijek bila iskrena u govoru.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima was always honest in her speech.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ تَكْذِبْ حَتَّى حِينَ كَانَ الْكَذِبُ أَسْهَلَ.
sentences.translation: Nije lagala čak i kad je laž bila lakša.
sentences.translationEn: She did not lie even when lying was easier.

sentences.arabic: قَالَتِ الْأُمُّ: الصِّدْقُ مِنْ أَجْمَلِ صِفَاتِ الْمُسْلِمِ.
sentences.translation: Majka je rekla: Iskrenost je jedna od najljepših osobina muslimana.
sentences.translationEn: The mother said: Honesty is one of the most beautiful qualities of a Muslim.

sentences.arabic: اقْتَنَعَتْ فَاطِمَةُ وَوَعَدَتْ أَنْ تَبْقَى صَادِقَةً.
sentences.translation: Fatima se uvjerila i obećala da ostane iskrena.
sentences.translationEn: Fatima was convinced and promised to remain honest.
